design_concept: Cyberpunk Gaming Marketplace for FiveM Dev Resources

typography.hero_h1_classes: text-6xl sm:text-[clamp(4rem,12vw,9rem)] font-black tracking-tighter uppercase text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-neutral-600

surface_strategies.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 z-50 sticky top-0
surface_strategies.product_cards: bg-[#111114] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#39FF14]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.15)] transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl group
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-[#39FF14] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#4ADE80] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)]
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-none hover:border-[#8A2BE2] hover:text-[#8A2BE2] transition-colors
surface_strategies.badges: bg-[#8A2BE2]/10 text-[#8A2BE2] border border-[#8A2BE2]/30 px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none font-mono

hero_background.description: Cyberpunk night city traffic, used with extreme opacity/gradient overlay (bg-black/80) so the neon lights barely bleed through. Placed behind the ZemDev massive text.

category_vehicles.description: Sports car driving through glowing blue tunnel for the Vehicles category card or product placeholder.

category_scripts.description: Computer code displayed on black background for the Scripts/Bases category card or placeholder.

product_placeholder_1.description: Vibrant urban alley with neon signs for general MLO/Map product placeholder.

product_placeholder_2.description: Purple and yellow car in the dark for specific vehicle mod product.

motion_and_effects.hover_states: All interactive elements must change color and add a subtle drop-shadow glow. Product cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_effects.hero_animation: Ensure the massive 'ZemDev' hero text is immediately visible. Apply a subtle glow animation if possible. Do NOT use standard Vercel gradients.
motion_and_effects.glitch_effect: Optional: Add a CSS glitch effect on hover for the ZemDev logo in the header.

component_instructions.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog for product details and the purchase modal. Background: #0A0A0C, border: 1px border-white/10. Primary CTA inside must be Neon Green.
component_instructions.tables: For the Admin Dashboard, use Shadcn Table. No backgrounds on rows, just border-b border-white/5. Hover state: bg-white/5.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn Input heavily customized: bg-[#050505], border-white/10, focus:border-[#39FF14] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#39FF14]/50.
component_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Google Fonts: 'Unbounded' (Headings), 'Outfit' (Body), and 'JetBrains Mono' (Code/Badges/Tech).
Build the hero section with MASSIVE 'ZemDev' text. Use fluid typography clamp(4rem, 12vw, 9rem) to respect maximum class rules while achieving the requested giant size.
Ensure the entire app is wrapped in a dark theme by default (<div className='dark text-white bg-[#050505] min-h-screen'>).
Implement the product catalog grid. Create a beautiful Product Card component containing an image, title, price in MXN, and a category badge.
Design the Purchase Modal to clearly display BBVA bank transfer information and a Discord contact button (which can utilize the Purple accent color).
Build the Admin Dashboard with a login view, and a table view to add/edit/delete products. Keep it dense and data-focused.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use the Unsplash/Pexels media URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, links, and forms have appropriate data-testid attributes for testing.
